master_row.title: Eigenvalue
master_row.canonical_statement: ic modes couple to KK tower when: \begin{equation} \omega_{nl}^\text{ac} = \omega_{n'l'}^B + \frac{mc}{R_\text{KK}} \quad (m \in \mathbb{Z}) \end{equation} \end{theorem} \subsection{Selection Rules} From angular momentum conservation: \begin{align} \Delta l &= 0, \pm 1, \pm 2 \\ \Delta m &= 0, \pm 1 \end{align} \section{Observable Signatures} \subsection{Predicted Spectrum} Expected absorption lines at: \begin{equation} f_\text{resonance} = f_0 \sqrt{1 + n^2\left(\frac{\lambda_\text{acoustic}}{\lambda_\text{KK}}\right)^2} \end{equation} \subsection{Topological Transition} At critical coupling $\lambda_g > \lambda_c$, the system undergoes topological phase transition characterized by quantized jump in helicity: \begin{equation} \Delta \mathcal{H}_M = n \cdot \Phi_0 \cdot L_\text{link} \end{equation} where $\Phi_0 = h/(2e)$ is the flux quantum and $L_\text{link}$ is the linking number. \section{Experimental Predictions} \subsection{Critical Parameters} \begin{itemize} \item \textbf{Sphere radius}: $R = 10$ cm \item \textbf{Gyro frequency}: $\omega_\text{gyro} = 10^4$ rad/s \item \textbf{Magnetic field}: $B_0
